languages.text: "Понимаю: когда зачитываешь приказ, хочется видеть глаза виновного. Но не медлите. Я не могу позволить убийце аристократа безнаказанно расхаживать подле Лорд-капитана".

traits.locale_text: "Понимаю: когда зачитываешь приказ, хочется видеть глаза виновного. Но не медлите. Я не могу позволить убийце аристократа безнаказанно расхаживать подле Лорд-капитана".

languages.text: "I understand: when you read out the order, you want to see the eyes of the culprit. But do not delay. I cannot stand by and let that noble-killer remain in the Lord Captain's presence without consequence."
languages.original_text: "Понимаю: когда зачитываешь приказ, хочется видеть глаза виновного. Но не медлите. Я не могу позволить убийце аристократа безнаказанно расхаживать подле Лорд-капитана".

traits.locale_text: "I understand: when you read out the order, you want to see the eyes of the culprit. But do not delay. I cannot stand by and let that noble-killer remain in the Lord Captain's presence without consequence."

"I understand: when you read out the order, you want to see the eyes of the culprit. But do not delay. I cannot stand by and let that noble-killer remain in the Lord Captain's presence without consequence."

"I understand: when you read out the order, you want to see the eyes of the culprit. But do not delay. I cannot stand by and let that noble-killer remain in the Lord Captain's presence without consequence."

languages.text: “我明白，你是想当面宣读判决，亲眼看看犯人的表情。但别耽搁太久。我绝不能眼睁睁看着那个杀害贵族的凶手留在舰长大人身边，还无需付出任何代价。”
languages.original_text: "I understand: when you read out the order, you want to see the eyes of the culprit. But do not delay. I cannot stand by and let that noble-killer remain in the Lord Captain's presence without consequence."

traits.locale_text: “我明白，你是想当面宣读判决，亲眼看看犯人的表情。但别耽搁太久。我绝不能眼睁睁看着那个杀害贵族的凶手留在舰长大人身边，还无需付出任何代价。”

languages.text: « Je comprends, vous tenez à regarder le coupable dans les yeux quand vous lirez son mandat d'arrestation. C'est d'accord, mais ne tardez pas. Je ne peux pas rester les bras croisés pendant que ce tueur de nobles rôde impunément dans l'entourage du seigneur-capitaine. »
languages.original_text: "I understand: when you read out the order, you want to see the eyes of the culprit. But do not delay. I cannot stand by and let that noble-killer remain in the Lord Captain's presence without consequence."

traits.locale_text: « Je comprends, vous tenez à regarder le coupable dans les yeux quand vous lirez son mandat d'arrestation. C'est d'accord, mais ne tardez pas. Je ne peux pas rester les bras croisés pendant que ce tueur de nobles rôde impunément dans l'entourage du seigneur-capitaine. »

languages.text: "Anlıyorum. Emri okurken suçlunun gözlerinin içine bakmak istiyorsunuz. Ancak geç kalmayın. Bir kenarda durup o soylu katilinin Lord Kaptan'ın huzurunda cezasını çekmeden durmasına katlanamam."
languages.original_text: "I understand: when you read out the order, you want to see the eyes of the culprit. But do not delay. I cannot stand by and let that noble-killer remain in the Lord Captain's presence without consequence."

traits.locale_text: "Anlıyorum. Emri okurken suçlunun gözlerinin içine bakmak istiyorsunuz. Ancak geç kalmayın. Bir kenarda durup o soylu katilinin Lord Kaptan'ın huzurunda cezasını çekmeden durmasına katlanamam."

languages.text: «Lo entiendo: quiere ver los ojos del culpable cuando lea la orden. Pero no se entretenga: no puedo permitir que ese asesino de nobles siga estando en presencia del Lord Capitán sin consecuencias».
languages.original_text: "I understand: when you read out the order, you want to see the eyes of the culprit. But do not delay. I cannot stand by and let that noble-killer remain in the Lord Captain's presence without consequence."

traits.locale_text: «Lo entiendo: quiere ver los ojos del culpable cuando lea la orden. Pero no se entretenga: no puedo permitir que ese asesino de nobles siga estando en presencia del Lord Capitán sin consecuencias».

languages.text: "Ich verstehe: Ihr wollt dem Schuldigen in die Augen sehen, wenn Ihr den Befehl verlest. Aber lasst Euch nicht zu viel Zeit. Ich kann diesen Adelsmörder nicht ungestraft im Umfeld des Lord Captains lassen."
languages.original_text: "I understand: when you read out the order, you want to see the eyes of the culprit. But do not delay. I cannot stand by and let that noble-killer remain in the Lord Captain's presence without consequence."

traits.locale_text: "Ich verstehe: Ihr wollt dem Schuldigen in die Augen sehen, wenn Ihr den Befehl verlest. Aber lasst Euch nicht zu viel Zeit. Ich kann diesen Adelsmörder nicht ungestraft im Umfeld des Lord Captains lassen."

languages.text: 「おわかりでしょう。罪人を指名する時、その罪人の顔を見たいのです。しかし、遅くはなりません。この尊い殺し屋を、罪を問わず、船長の前に残しておくことはできません。」
languages.original_text: "I understand: when you read out the order, you want to see the eyes of the culprit. But do not delay. I cannot stand by and let that noble-killer remain in the Lord Captain's presence without consequence."

traits.locale_text: 「おわかりでしょう。罪人を指名する時、その罪人の顔を見たいのです。しかし、遅くはなりません。この尊い殺し屋を、罪を問わず、船長の前に残しておくことはできません。」
